summary: AI/ML Engineer and BTech Computer Science student specializing in Artificial Intelligence, delivering end-to-end Generative AI and RAG-based applications. Architect complex NLP workflows using LangChain and LangGraph to drive operational automation and predictive analytics. Deploying production-grade MLOps pipelines with FastAPI and Docker to transform raw data into scalable AI agents that solve business gaps.

bullet_points: Architected an agentic RAG system using LangGraph and FastAPI, cutting customer support response times by 40% in production.
Optimized deep learning model inferences using quantization techniques, reducing GPU memory footprint by 25% for 10k daily requests.
Designed automated evaluation pipelines for LLM outputs, increasing output accuracy to 96% and ensuring strict brand compliance.

projects.name: TailoredResume.ai
bullet_points: Built a multi-agent resume tailoring backend utilizing Gemini API and FastAPI to match job description keywords and format criteria.
Implemented real-time ATS scoring algorithms to evaluate resume linguistic diversity, quantification metrics, and word limits.
Designed a precise PDF rendering engine using ReportLab supporting single-page classic and two-column resume templates.
Deployed the service to Vercel and optimized static file serving, achieving 100% Core Web Vitals on mobile and desktop viewports.

certifications: Generative AI with Large Language Models — DeepLearning.AI
